info.name: HR Back End - Payroll API
info.description:
Postman collection for payroll salary setup, payroll run generation and lifecycle, payroll export, and employee self-service payslips.

Payroll rule snapshot:
- no allowance
- no commission
- no late salary cut
- overtime adds salary
- only approved unpaid leave reduces salary
- salary is prorated for join or resign mid-month
- payroll generation is all-or-nothing
- employee_salaries is the source of truth
- employee_positions.base_salary is compatibility-only fallback when no salary history exists

request.description:
Required permission: `payroll.run.view`.

Success response example:
{
  "id": 1,
  "payroll_month": "2026-04-01",
  "status": "approved",
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "employee_code": "EMP001",
      "employee_name": "Dara Lim",
      "base_salary": "2100.00",
      "prorated_base_salary": "2000.00",
      "overtime_pay": "60.00",
      "unpaid_leave_deduction": "100.00",
      "net_salary": "1960.00"
    }
  ]
}

Validation error example:
- no request payload validation on this route
- invalid or missing payrollRun path value returns 404

Auth or permission error example:
{
  "message": "Forbidden."
}

Required permission: `payroll.export`.

Exports payroll_run and payroll_items snapshots only. No payroll recalculation happens during export.

Success response example:
HTTP 200 download with content type application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet and filename payroll-run-2026-04.xlsx.

Validation error example:
- no request payload validation on this route
- invalid or missing payrollRun path value returns 404

Auth or permission error example:
{
  "message": "Forbidden."
}

Required permission: `payroll.payslip.view-own`.

Access rule:
- authenticated employee can only open their own payroll item

Success response example:
{
  "id": 1,
  "payroll_run_id": 3,
  "payroll_month": "2026-04-01",
  "payroll_status": "paid",
  "salary_source": "employee_salaries",
  "base_salary": "2100.00",
  "prorated_base_salary": "2000.00",
  "overtime_pay": "60.00",
  "unpaid_leave_deduction": "100.00",
  "net_salary": "1960.00"
}

Validation error example:
- no request payload validation on this route
- invalid or missing payrollItem path value returns 404

Auth or permission error example:
{
  "message": "Forbidden."
}
